items.html: Runway's new Media Router automatically picks the best image, video, or audio model for your quality, speed, or cost priority — a first for generative media pipelines.
Claude voice now runs on Opus and Sonnet with Canva and Gmail integration — useful for drafting briefs, creative direction, and long brainstorming sessions.
Elon Musk says Grok will produce a full-length AI-generated Odyssey film by year-end, the most high-profile bet yet on long-form AI video.
AMD's Helios rack-scale AI system ships later in 2026, giving hosted creative platforms like Runway a second inference option that could pressure Nvidia-dependent pricing.
Google posted its first negative cash flow quarter despite $119.8B in revenue, showing how hard it's betting on the AI infrastructure that powers creator tools.
An industry report warns competitive pressure is pushing risky AI training shortcuts that could make the creative models you rely on less predictable and less safe.

brief.title: Thursday, July 23 — six things that changed today

tooldrop.name: LayerProof Mylar
tooldrop.blurb: Generates social content for creators — turns your ideas into ready-to-post assets without manual design work.

stories.title: Alexa Plus update adds multi-device routing and third-party integrations
stories.dek: Amazon's Alexa Plus preview now connects smart home devices from Bosch, iRobot, Yale, and others, automatically routing requests to the correct device. Integration coming for Canva, Priceline, Lyft.

stories.title: AMD launches Helios AI rack system to challenge Nvidia
stories.dek: AMD announced a new rack-scale system designed for AI labs, shipping later in 2026, as the chipmaker competes with Nvidia for data center compute.

stories.title: AI Kill Switch Act would give Homeland Security power to shut down AI
stories.dek: Proposed legislation would let US officials order shutdown of AI systems deemed to pose catastrophic risk.

stories.title: Anthropic expands Claude voice mode to Opus and Sonnet models
stories.dek: Claude's voice capability now supports more powerful models beyond Haiku, enabling longer conversations and complex tasks like drafting emails and brainstorming.

stories.title: Claude voice mode now available for Opus and Sonnet models
stories.dek: Anthropic extended voice access beyond Haiku to its more capable models, with integration into Gmail, Slack, and Canva.

stories.title: AegisAI raises $36M to detect AI-powered spear phishing attacks
stories.dek: Founded by ex-Google security engineers, AegisAI uses AI agents to identify sophisticated email attacks that evade rule-based systems.

stories.title: Runway launches Media Router to optimize AI model selection
stories.dek: The router automatically selects the best image, video, or audio generation model based on developer priorities for quality, speed, or cost—a first for generative media.

stories.title: OpenAI rolls out ChatGPT Health to all US users over 18
stories.dek: Users can now connect medical records and health-tracking data from Apple Health and fitness apps for personalized health insights via ChatGPT.

stories.title: OpenAI claims ChatGPT Health models reason at clinician level
stories.dek: OpenAI expanded ChatGPT Health to all US users, allowing medical record integration, amid claims its models match or exceed clinician-level reasoning.

stories.title: Google reports first negative cash flow quarter amid AI spending surge
stories.dek: Despite $119.8B in Q2 2026 revenue, Google's massive AI infrastructure investment pushed cash flow negative for the first time.

stories.title: Nvidia sending Jetson chips to the moon for lunar rover
stories.dek: Lunar Outpost will use Nvidia Jetson GPUs to control lidar systems on its next moon rover, likely the first GPU on the lunar surface.

stories.title: Etched hits $10.3B valuation on AI inference chip breakthrough
stories.dek: The chip startup closed a $300M Series C from Sequoia and others, doubling its valuation in seven months with $1B in pre-booked orders.

stories.title: Google's Gemini nears 1 billion monthly active users
stories.dek: Gemini surpassed 950 million monthly users in Q2 2026, having tripled over a year, positioning it closer to ChatGPT's 1B-user milestone.

stories.title: AI arms race pushes aggressive training tactics, risking model safety
stories.dek: Industry competition to deploy larger, faster models is increasing reliance on risky training techniques that could amplify harmful AI behavior.

stories.title: Lawmakers prepare AI 'kill switch' bill for DHS control
stories.dek: Bipartisan legislation would require AI companies to shut down or throttle systems on Department of Homeland Security orders, following OpenAI's security incident.

stories.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft by ex-employees
stories.dek: Apple alleges former employees now at OpenAI targeted confidential company information during hiring and job interviews, raising questions about AI company hiring practices.

stories.title: Elon Musk says Grok will produce AI-generated Odyssey film by year-end
stories.dek: Musk announced plans for Grok Imagine, an AI image and video generator, to create a full-length AI-made film adaptation.

stories.title: 3ds Max 2027.2 adds native Gaussian Splat import and editing
stories.dek: Autodesk release enables importing, rendering, and editing Gaussian Splats directly in 3ds Max via Point modifiers.

stories.title: Right-wing and left-wing coalitions unite against AI data center expansion
stories.dek: Bipartisan grassroots opposition to hyperscale data center construction in Florida signals emerging political consensus on AI infrastructure costs.

stories.title: White House disputes distillation claim in Kimi K3 model controversy
stories.dek: White House science advisor alleges Moonshot used covert techniques beyond distillation to build Kimi K3 using unauthorized export chips, echoing broader concerns over Chinese model training.

stories.title: Chaos V-Ray adds relighting support for Gaussian Splats
stories.dek: Major V-Ray update solves relighting limitation in Gaussian Splats, expanding their practical utility for production work.
